criteria.description: The share surface is simplified to a single visible card, uses the production challenge link, and avoids repeating the score block across the visible battle text.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies the share entry point, the updated production URL payload, and the simplified share surface behavior.

criteria.description: The header no longer displays the borrowed logo, and the SBTI gate now lives in Hero as the prerequisite for starting the Task 1-6 simulation.
criteria.notes: The regression suite verifies that the Hero watch action is a gated button, the Journey start remains disabled until SBTI is provided, and the watch flow scrolls into the Journey section.

criteria.description: The 007 implementation remains buildable and all automated validation stays green after the share/header/SBTI relayout changes.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: The final validation run passed 28 tests across 4 files, and the Vite production build completed successfully.

criteria.description: All three work packages are recorded in the done lane for the 007 mission before acceptance.
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP03 are all materialized in the done lane after the direct-repo override flow.
